chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Al-Tala’a (one-third residue of evaporated grape juice)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/284)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/284)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا كَانَ يَخْضِبُ الْإِنَاءَ فَاشْرَبْهُ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When the vessel was coloured (due to the evaporation of the two-thirds of it), so drink it’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ibn abu ‘Umayr has narrated from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When two-thirds of juice (grape juice) is evaporated (because of boiling) then you can drink it.’”
